title: Nextera DNA Flex NGS Library Prep: Cherrypick Samples
author: Opentrons

steps.title: 1, A1, A1 1, C5, A2...
steps.instruction: 1, A1, A1 1, C5, A2 3, H9, A3 9, E3, B1 ``` Links: * [Cherrypick Samples](./nextera-flex-library-prep-cherrypick-samples) * [Tagment DNA](./nextera-flex-library-prep-tagment-dna) * [Post Tagmentation Cleanup](./nextera-flex-library-prep-post-tag-cleanup) * [Amplify Tagmented DNA](./nextera-flex-library-prep-amplify-tagmented-dna) * [Cleanup Libraries](./nextera-flex-library-prep-cleanup-libraries) --- * Olympus 96-well PCR plates 200ul * [Bio-Rad Hard Shell 96-well low profile PCR plate 200ul #hsp9601](bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/hsp9601-hard-shell-96-well-pcr-plates-low-profile-thin-wall-skirted-white-clear?ID=hsp9601) * [P50/P300 Single-channel electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes) * [300ul Opentrons tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) --- Preprogram the thermocycler according to the BLT PCR program parameters described in the kit manual. 4x6 aluminum block tuberack (slot 4, mounted on temperature module) * A1-C

steps.title: mastermix 1
steps.instruction: mastermix 1.5ml snapcap tubes (loaded empty, 1 tube needed per 32 samples) * A2-D

steps.title: EPM in 0
steps.instruction: EPM in 0.5ml false-bottom tubes (1 tube needed per 24 samples) * A3-B

steps.title: nuclease-free water in 1
steps.instruction: nuclease-free water in 1.5ml snapcap tubes (1 tube needed per 48 samples)

steps.title: Input your pipette type and mount,...
steps.instruction: Input your pipette type and mount, your cherrypicking CSV, the volume to cherrypick (in ul), and the starting tip position.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
